# services.librespeed

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.librespeed`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.librespeed.domain` | `null or non-empty string` | If not `null`, this will add an entry to `services.librespeed.servers` and configure librespeed to use TLS. |
| `services.librespeed.downloadIPDB` | `boolean` | Whether to download the IP info database before starting librespeed. Disable this if you want to use the Go implementation. |
| `services.librespeed.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable LibreSpeed server. |
| `services.librespeed.frontend.contactEmail` | `string` | Email address listed in the privacy policy. |
| `services.librespeed.frontend.enable` | `boolean` | Enables the LibreSpeed frontend and adds a nginx virtual host if not explicitly disabled and `services.librespeed.domain` is not `null`. |
| `services.librespeed.frontend.pageTitle` | `string` | Title of the webpage. |
| `services.librespeed.frontend.servers` | `list of (submodule)` | LibreSpeed servers that should appear in the server list. |
| `services.librespeed.frontend.servers.*.dlURL` | `non-empty string` | URL path to download test on this server. Append `.php` to the default value if the server uses the php implementation. |
| `services.librespeed.frontend.servers.*.getIpURL` | `non-empty string` | URL path to IP lookup on this server. Append `.php` to the default value if the server uses the php implementation. |
| `services.librespeed.frontend.servers.*.name` | `non-empty string` | Name shown in the server list. |
| `services.librespeed.frontend.servers.*.pingURL` | `non-empty string` | URL path to latency/jitter test on this server. Append `.php` to the default value if the server uses the php implementation. |
| `services.librespeed.frontend.servers.*.server` | `non-empty string` | URL to the server. You may use `//` instead of `http://` or `https://`. |
| `services.librespeed.frontend.servers.*.ulURL` | `non-empty string` | URL path to upload test on this server. Append `.php` to the default value if the server uses the php implementation. |
| `services.librespeed.frontend.settings` | `null or (open submodule of attribute set of (boolean or signed integer or string or floating point number))` | Override default settings of the speedtest web client. See [speedtest_worker.js][link] for a list of possible values. \[link\]: https://github.com/librespeed/speedtest/blob/master/speedtest_worker.js#L39 |
| `services.librespeed.frontend.useNginx` | `boolean` | Configure nginx for the LibreSpeed frontend. This will only create a virtual host for the frontend and won't proxy all requests because the reported upload and download speeds are inaccurate if proxied. |
| `services.librespeed.package` | `package` | The librespeed-rust package to use. |
| `services.librespeed.secrets` | `null or (attribute set of absolute path not in the Nix store)` | Attribute set of filesystem paths. The contents of the specified paths will be read at service start time and merged with the attributes provided in `settings`. |
| `services.librespeed.settings` | `null or (attribute set of (null or boolean or signed integer or string or package))` | LibreSpeed configuration written as Nix expression. All values set to `null` will be excluded from the evaluated config. This is useful if you want to omit certain defaults when using a different LibreSpeed implementation. See [github.com/librespeed](https://github.com/librespeed/speedtest-rust) for configuration help. |
| `services.librespeed.tlsCertificate` | `null or non-empty string` | TLS certificate to use. Use together with `tlsKey`. |
| `services.librespeed.tlsKey` | `null or non-empty string` | TLS private key to use. Use together with `tlsCertificate`. |
| `services.librespeed.useACMEHost` | `null or non-empty string` | Use a certificate generated by the NixOS ACME module for the given host. Note that this will not generate a new certificate - you will need to do so with `security.acme.certs`. |
